subject: Added interlayerAttachment resource SOTN NNI usecase
commit_message:
Added interlayerAttachment resource SOTN NNI usecase

Added interlayerAttachment resource to associate
overlay TP(p-interface) to underlay TTP and
edge rule.

Change-Id: Ibb5b109bc930edaa2da554a33901f812d45954f4
Issue-ID: AAI-2593
Signed-off-by: shashikanth.vh <shashikanth.vh@huawei.com>

Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1

I see model attributes in interlayerAttachment node (model-invariant-id, model-customization-id).
Is interlayerAttachment created from a SDC model i,e. is it model driven?

Thanks
-Chandra

Patch Set 4:
